title: Medical Documentation and Secretariat Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Medical Documentation and Secretariat Program Learning Outcomes

1. Understands and accurately uses basic medical terminology.

2. Carries out medical record-keeping and documentation in compliance with relevant regulations.

3. Efficiently performs patient admission, filing, and archiving tasks.

4. Applies office management and secretarial services effectively in healthcare settings.

5. Prepares medical correspondence and documents in line with professional standards.

6. Uses information technologies and automation systems effectively in the professional field.

7. Demonstrates behaviors in accordance with patient privacy, ethical principles, and legal regulations.

8. Communicates effectively with healthcare staff and patients.

9. Adapts to teamwork and assumes responsibility.

10. Follows developments in the field and embraces lifelong learning.
